I_RATE_AAN1PQRS_IEP_NEHR Include PQRS AAN 1 in Quality Composite (IEP Non-eCQM) Indicator for whether PQRS AAN 1 is included in Quality Composite Score (IEP Non-eCQM) (Effective Clinical Care) 4497 Num 8 
I_RATE_AAN2PQRS_IEP_NEHR Include PQRS AAN 2 in Quality Composite (IEP Non-eCQM) Indicator for whether PQRS AAN 2 is included in Quality Composite Score (IEP Non-eCQM) (Community/Population Health) 4498 Num 8 
I_RATE_AAN3PQRS_IEP_NEHR Include PQRS AAN 3 in Quality Composite (IEP Non-eCQM)
